artPrompt: A lone figure slumps in a beige waiting chair, an arcane cyan sound-wave halo of repeating saxophone notes coiling endlessly around their head like a glowing snare, their face slack and emptied of memory. Towering filing cabinets recede behind them into humming fluorescent haze. Intimate yet vast film-still composition with looming depth, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: Indefinite Hold Music
text:
Enchant creature
Enchanted creature doesn't untap during its controller's untap step. (Your call is very important to us.)
flavorText: The same eight bars of saxophone, forever, until you forget what you wanted.
